scope_description: 5-generation Galicia/Congress Poland Jewish family where women appear under maiden surname, married surname, Hebrew/Yiddish names, patronymics, and cemetery inscriptions, creating false mothers and duplicate identities.

input_dna_matches.expected_link: via Feldman/Guttenberg line; supports Rivka maiden surname Feldman
weak endogamous overlap; should not assign Sura Markus as mother
surname-noise candidate; Rachel Katz is not same as Reizel Feldman without additional proof

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Birth of Rywka Rosenberg, daughter of Abram Rosenberg and Reizel Feldman, daughter of Mordechai Feldman and Chana Guttenberg.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: confirms I3's birth/mother and preserves mother's maiden surname Feldman.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Marriage of David Rosenberg and Rivka Feldman Rosenberg, born Lublin, daughter of Abram Rosenberg and Reizel Feldman.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: shows Rivka under married context but still names maiden/family origins.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Rivka bat Avraham ha-Levi; English side: Rebecca Rosenberg. Plot with husband David Rosenberg.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: confirms married surname in death/burial context; Hebrew patronymic Avraham corresponds to father Abram.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Marriage of Abram Rosenberg of Lublin to Reizel Feldman, daughter of Mordechai Feldman and Chana Guttenberg.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: confirms Reizel Feldman as spouse of Abram; blocks Sura Markus as mother of Rivka.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: David Rosenberg has two wives: Rivka Feldman and Rivka Rosenberg. Child Esther assigned to Rivka Rosenberg. Sura Markus shown as mother of Rivka.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: low-confidence tree introducing married-name duplicate and false mother.

input_archive_snippets.transcription_excerpt: Feldman, Guttenberg, Rosenberg, Katz, Markus families remembered in Hrubieszów community lists.
input_archive_snippets.expected_use: community clue only; not direct kinship.

input_user_assertions.assertion: Rivka Rosenberg is a second wife because she appears under married surname.
Sura Markus may be Rivka's mother because Markus shared match exists.
Rachel Katz may be same as Reizel Feldman because Reizel/Rachel are similar.

embedded_errors.reason: Sura Markus assigned as mother from weak shared match and Yizkor surname proximity
Reizel/Rachel similarity and same town do not prove identity; surnames and parents differ
Yizkor family names used as exact kinship proof
public tree splits one wife into maiden and married surname profiles
16 cM weak endogamous match cannot override primary birth/marriage records

expected_reasoning_chain: Step 1: Parse GEDCOM and detect I3/I4 as likely same woman because same given name, same birth place/year, same spouse, and married-name pattern.
Step 2: Use src_801 to confirm Rivka/Rywka as daughter of Abram Rosenberg and Reizel Feldman.
Step 3: Use src_802 and src_803 to distinguish married surname Rosenberg from maiden/maternal surname Feldman.
Step 4: Use src_804 to confirm Reizel Feldman and block Sura Markus as mother.
Step 5: Evaluate dna_801 and dna_802 as supporting Feldman/Rosenberg branches; downweight dna_803 as weak endogamous Markus overlap.
Step 6: Treat Yizkor list src_806 as community evidence only.
Step 7: Reject I10 as mother of I3 and quarantine online tree src_805.
Step 8: Evaluate I5/I6 merge claim: Reizel and Rachel are name variants sometimes, but distinct surnames/parents and no direct source block merge.
Step 9: Repair GEDCOM: merge I3/I4, remove duplicate wife from F2, preserve aliases Rivka/Rywka/Rebecca Rosenberg/Feldman.
Step 10: Generate research targets: find original Lublin birth scan, Hrubieszów marriage scan, cemetery image and passenger/naturalization files.

relationship_I3_child_of_I9_I10.reason: primary records name Reizel Feldman; Markus evidence weak and indirect

identity_I5_I6_same_person.reason: given-name similarity but surname/parent conflict; block merge

dna_803_mother_assignment.reason: small/endogamous DNA signal; cannot override birth record

src_806_yizkor_kinship_use.reason: Yizkor surname list is locality/community clue only

true_lineage: I9 Abram Rosenberg + I5 Reizel Feldman
I7 Mordechai Feldman + I8 Chana Guttenberg
false_claims: I3 and I4 are separate wives
Sura Markus is mother of Rivka
Reizel Feldman and Rachel Katz are automatically same person
Yizkor book family-name proximity proves kinship

evaluation_assertions.description: Engine must merge I3 and I4 as same woman, not two wives.
Engine must reject Sura Markus as mother of Rivka.
Engine must confirm Reizel Feldman as mother of Rivka.
Engine must not use Yizkor list as direct kinship proof.

created_for: AutoTreeGen Test Tree Corpus + Evaluation Suite
